info.title: SmsHttps API
info.description:
Swagger definition for xStore Web Services


Request Parameters (Required)

CN= Session ID received after login
DN= The Device Name is used allow only web services with this namespace
BW= Client browser ID (IE, FF, CH, OP)

SessionCN.name: CN
SessionCN.description: Session token obtained after login (CN= value).

DN.name: DN
DN.description: The Device Name is used allow only web services with this namespace (eStore, mStore)

BW.name: BW
BW.description: Client browser ID (IE, FF, CH, OP)

tags.name: Auxiliaries
tags.description: List of stores, departments, categories, subdepartments, recipes, family code and classification

get.description: Logs in a customer as anonymous. Request Parameters

parameters.name: LOGIN_PRM
parameters.description: Login parameters, version and language etc.

200.description:
Loads the session params and values.
Loads the communication preferences of the customer. Load some items from the profile table used in the application. Loads the default route options. Returns customer balances. Returns the transaction mode.

get.summary: Login as user with an account
get.description: Log in customer as with a username and password. Request Parameters

parameters.name: LOGIN_PRM
parameters.description: Login parameters, version and language etc.

200.description:
Loads the session params and values.
Loads the communication preferences of the customer.
Load some items from the profile table used in the application.
Loads the default route options.
Return balances.

get.description:
*May not work as it requires captcha.

Request Parameters

Optional Parameters CLT_TAB fields

200.description: Successful XML response confirming account creation.
Successful XML response create base64 image.

application/xml.example: hookExec TrsCltCaptcha URVHRWBSHIAP

get.summary: Performs account lookup and initiates recovery.

parameters.name: F03
parameters.description: Optional item department filter (maps to F03).

parameters.name: F17
parameters.description: Optional sub department filter (maps to F17).

200.description: Successful response returning XML records and metadata
Successful response returning XML records and metadata

get.summary: Get Item detail specifying entry (UPC code)

          <ENTRYQTY>1</ENTRYQTY>
          <SAL_REG-F30>0.7</SAL_REG-F30>

          <SAL_REG-F113>REG</SAL_REG-F113>

          <F2928>THUMB</F2928>

      </bitmaps>
      <coupon>
        <record>
          <offerValid>MISS</offerValid>

        <record>

get.summary: Returns all required fields for the customer account.
get.description:
Store information, communication and food preferences.

Request Parameters

Optional Parameters
NONE

application/xml.example:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="ISO-8859-1"?>
<root>
  <hooks>
    <hook>
      <type>hookExec</type>
      <alias>TrsCltEdit</alias>
      <data>
        <record>
          <CLT_TAB-F1148>2</CLT_TAB-F1148>
          <CLT_TAB-F902>ESTORE</CLT_TAB-F902>
          <CLT_TAB-F1000>PAL</CLT_TAB-F1000>
          <CLT_TAB-F1001></CLT_TAB-F1001>
          <CLT_TAB-F1150>Customer</CLT_TAB-F1150>
          <CLT_TAB-F1152></CLT_TAB-F1152>
          <CLT_TAB-F1153></CLT_TAB-F1153>
          <CLT_TAB-F1172>6019521325</CLT_TAB-F1172>
          <CLT_TAB-F1573>nick.alexiou@gmail.com</CLT_TAB-F1573>
          <CLT_TAB-F253>09/09/2025</CLT_TAB-F253>
          <CLT_TAB-F1149>Jonkd</CLT_TAB-F1149>
          <CLT_TAB-F1155>Select customer</CLT_TAB-F1155>
          <CLT_TAB-F1156>1867 berlier</CLT_TAB-F1156>
          <CLT_TAB-F1158>Laval</CLT_TAB-F1158>
          <CLT_TAB-F1159>H7L3S4</CLT_TAB-F1159>
          <CLT_TAB-F1170>Québec</CLT_TAB-F1170>
          <CLT_TAB-F1171>Canada</CLT_TAB-F1171>
          <CLT_TAB-F1264>05/15/2018</CLT_TAB-F1264>
          <CLT_TAB-F1525>001</CLT_TAB-F1525>
          <CLT_TAB-F1964>001</CLT_TAB-F1964>
          <CLT_TAB-F2875>5147267441</CLT_TAB-F2875>
          <!-- Delivery Address (eStore) -->
          <CLT_TAB-F1643></CLT_TAB-F1643>
          <CLT_TAB-F1644></CLT_TAB-F1644>
          <CLT_TAB-F1645></CLT_TAB-F1645>
          <CLT_TAB-F1646></CLT_TAB-F1646>
          <CLT_TAB-F1647></CLT_TAB-F1647>
          <CLT_TAB-F1648></CLT_TAB-F1648>
          <CLT_TAB-F1649></CLT_TAB-F1649>
          <CLT_TAB-F1650></CLT_TAB-F1650>
          <CLT_TAB-F2889></CLT_TAB-F2889>
          <!-- Store Information -->
          <STD_TAB-F1056>001</STD_TAB-F1056>
          <STD_TAB-F1531>Company Name</STD_TAB-F1531>
          <STD_TAB-F1532>Address</STD_TAB-F1532>
          <STD_TAB-F1534>City</STD_TAB-F1534>
          <STD_TAB-F1549>State</STD_TAB-F1549>
          <STD_TAB-F2842>75</STD_TAB-F2842>
          <STD_TAB-F2843>-43</STD_TAB-F2843>
        </record>
      </data>
      <comm>
        <record><data>HOTSMS</data><caption>Immediate offers</caption></record>
        <record><data>OFFER</data><caption>Receive offers by email</caption></record>
        <record><data>BIRTHDAY</data><caption>Receive birthday offers by email</caption></record>
        <record><data>NEWS</data><caption>Receive our newsletter by email</caption></record>
        <record><data>FLYER</data><caption>Email me deals and recommendations</caption></record>
        <record><data>RECEIPTS</data><caption>Receive eReceipt by email</caption></record>
      </comm>
      <food>
        <record><data>VEGE</data><caption>Vegetarian</caption></record>
        <record><data>VEGA</data><caption>Vegan</caption></record>
        <record><data>GLUTEN</data><caption>Gluten free</caption></record>
        <record><data>NUTFREE</data><caption>Nut free</caption></record>
        <record><data>LOWCARB</data><caption>Reduced/low carb</caption></record>
        <record><data>LOWSODIUM</data><caption>Reduced/low sodium</caption></record>
        <record><data>DAIRYFREE</data><caption>Lactose free</caption></record>
        <record><data>SUGARFREE</data><caption>Sugar free</caption></record>
      </food>
    </hook>
  </hooks>
</root>

get.description:
Request Parameters

Optional Parameters
Field Description
F1149Cust. first name
F1150Cust. last name
F1155Cust. company name
F1156Cust. address 1
F1157Cust. address 2
F1158Cust. city
F1159Cust. zip/postal code
F1170Cust. province/state
F1171Cust. country
F1172Cust. phone number
F1173Cust. fax number
F1504Customer language
F1520Password
F1525Calling store
F1573Email address
F1743Marketing preference
F2875Cust. cell phone
F2900Notification preference
F2997Customer PIN

get.summary: Allows the customer to change the opt-in status of a program or programs.
get.description:
Returns balances.

Returns Mode.

Returns the sales header.

Request Parameters

Required Parameters

PROGRAMx x=program number or letter=(Optin=1, Optout=0). Can be chained. i.e. program1=1&programA=0

Optional Parameters
NONE

application/xml.example:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<root>
	<hooks>
		<hook>
			<type>modeChange</type>
			<mode>CLT</mode>
			<state>2</state>
			<step>2</step>
		</hook>
		<hook>
			<type>hookExec</type>
			<alias>PosSalHdr</alias>
			<data>
				<record>
					<SAL_HDR-F1032>439</SAL_HDR-F1032>

get.summary: Returns the points programs letter, number, opt in status and balance.
Return the point history can be filtered by point program.
get.description:
Returns balances.

Returns Mode.

Returns the sales header.

Request Parameters

Required Parameters

PROGRAMx x=program number or letter=(Optin=1, Optout=0). Can be chained. i.e. program1=1&programA=0
